title: rubus idaeus subsp. strigosus
intro: Rubus idaeus subsp. strigosus, also known as the American red raspberry, is a subspecies of the raspberry plant that is native to North America. The medicinal properties of this plant include its high content of antioxidants and anthocyanins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus idaeus subsp. strigosus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide anti-cancer properties. Rubus idaeus subsp. strigosus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
